reviews.comment:
La atención siempre es muy correcta y muy rápida, hay muchas islas de despacho así que no hay prácticamente espwra. Están remodelando el sector de kiosco/bar.

(Translated by Google)
The service is always very attentive and fast. There are many delivery islands, so there's virtually no waiting. They're remodeling the kiosk/bar area.

reviewReply.comment:

Nos alegra que tu visita haya cumplido tus expectativas ¡Esperamos recibirte nuevamente!
ATT: ACCESO NORTE ll

reviews.comment:
Bien el bar, es chico, la atención es regular pero para compensar esto, al medio día hay comida "al plato", más allá de los típicos sandwiches de estacion de servicio, así que puede ser un muy buen lugar para un almuerzo de paso por la zona. Impecable como siempre el ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The bar is fine, it's small, the service is just okay, but to compensate, at lunchtime they serve full meals, in addition to the typical gas station sandwiches, so it can be a very good place for a quick lunch while you're in the area. The ACA is impeccable as always.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNmRyWWZREAE

reviews.comment:

They saved us on the 25th at two in the morning when we were almost out of gas. Kindness and service. Thank you!!!!

Desastre,fui a cambiar la pelota por punto y me obligaban a cargar 20 litros de nafta en un scooter.Fui a otro y me lo combinaron sin ningún problema!! LA ENCARGADA UN DESASTRE Y PREPOTENTE!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Disaster! I went to exchange the ball for a point and they forced me to carry 20 liters of gas on a scooter. I went to another place and they arranged it for me without any problem! The manager was a disaster and arrogant!

reviews.comment:
Veo muy buen puntaje pero como cliente relativamente frecuente ha desmejorado muchísimo. Otra usuaria comenta que no se respeta el orden de llegada: me pasó. Idem mala atención. Playeros desmotivados, llegas y aunque estén libres, demoran en atender. Surtidores que no funcionan. La última: dos semanas consecutivas quise cargar pero me advirtieron "solo efectivo y no damos ningún tipo de ticket..." Uy si yo hago eso, nadie sospecha nada....? Falla de sistema más de 2 semanas... Mmm. Soy socio ACA... No les importa. Cargo en cualquier otro lado.

(Translated by Google)
I see a very good rating, but as a relatively frequent customer, it's deteriorated significantly. Another user comments that the order of arrival is not respected: it happened to me. Same bad service. Unmotivated beachgoers. You arrive, and even if they're free, they take a long time to serve you. Pumps that don't work. The most recent: two weeks in a row, I tried to charge but was warned, "cash only and we don't issue any kind of ticket..." Oh, if I do that, no one suspects a thing...? System failure for more than two weeks... Hmm. I'm an ACA member... They don't care. I'll charge somewhere else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCMEpUV09nEAE
